title: Hrudaya Geetha
desc: Radha, a caring teacher, finds herself the unexpected protector of Krishna, a young man living with the mind of a child after a life-changing accident.

title: Annapoorna
desc: Vedavathi wants a daughter-in-law who will lift the village from the curse of Goddess Annapurna.

title: Manetana
desc: Ananda Bhairavi embarks on a mission to find the perfect daughter-in-law who shares the same values as her. However, this creates tensions in her family.

title: Sumangali
desc: Deepa is a girl with a broken marriage and also the sole earner of her family. Moreover, her brother-in-law is the culprit behind her troubles.

title: Chi Sow Mahalakshmi
desc: Kanaka and Vishal enter into a marriage after experiencing personal challenges. However, the pair must navigate various family disagreements within their home.

title: Raktha Sambandha
desc: Kanaka Durga's sister-in-law Priya swaps her infant son for the former's infant daughter since Kanaka Durga yearns for a male child.

title: Mane Aliya
desc: A man opposes his partner to dismantle her vanity and restore his parent's prestige.

title: Sandhaya Raaga
desc: A tragedy leads Sandhya's daughter Maya to her estranged aunt Janaki's home. However, Janaki grows concerned as Maya's modern outlook influences her own daughter.

title: Krishna Rukku
desc: Rukku fights to save her family as her brother's death exposes secrets within the family, sparking a clash of love, betrayal, and fate.

title: Krishna Rukku
desc: Rukku fights to save her family as her brother's death exposes secrets within the family, sparking a clash of love, betrayal, and fate.

title: Amruthadhaare
desc: Goutham, a successful entrepreneur, enters a union of mutual benefit with Bhoomika, a brilliant woman who is almost ten years younger than him.

title: Annayya
desc: Shivanna, an elder brother, nurtures his four sisters, undertaking the responsibility of getting them married. However, he realises that marriage is not their only life goal.

title: Karna
desc: A talented male gynaecologist defies gender roles like balancing household chores and family duties, while standing strong against a patriarchal father and scheming relatives.

title: Lakshmi Nivasa
desc: Lakshmi and Srinivas, a middle-class couple, save money to fulfill their dreams, but their children have a different agenda for themselves.

title: Adi lakashmi Purana
desc: Seeking a fresh start, Lakshmi moves from her small town to the city, only to become the constant target of Adi's mockery. However, an unexpected twist of fate binds them in a marriage.

title: Naa Ninna Bidalarre
desc: Ambika dies due to Maya's schemes, but as a spirit, she guards her daughter Hita. Later, she seeks help from her long-lost sister, Durga, to protect Hita from Maya's malice.

title: Brahmagantu
desc: When her sister elopes with her lover before the wedding, a reluctant Deepa is forced to marry the groom instead. However, due to her ordinary looks, her in-laws are far from welcoming.

title: Dheerga Sumangali Bhava
desc: Bhanumathi shares the news of Arjun's adoption plan with Indra. Later, Subhadra catches Bhanumathi demanding that Indra vanish from the house for good.

desc: Rukku fights to save her family as her brother's death exposes secrets within the family, sparking a clash of love, betrayal, and fate.

title: Mugulu Nage
desc: Pulakeshi is romantically involved with three women at different points in his life, which teaches him the meaning of love.

title: Aaradhane
desc: A religious leader performs sacred rituals and worships the idol of a Hindu deity while chanting holy hymns to seek divine blessings.

title: Navu Nammavaru
desc: The host and guest discuss unique cultures of different states, showing video clips of local traditions and cuisines, and talking to people from various regions who share their experiences.

title: RMM Teleshopping
desc: The host present products from reputable brands, offered at affordable prices with a wide unique range of variety, allowing the customers to purchase these items from the comfort of their homes.

desc: A religious scholar delivers a discourse based on the Holy Bible and encourages everyone to follow the Word of God to lead a peaceful life.
